title: belvala virgata
intro_study: According to "Journal of ethnopharmacology", belvala virgata benefits include analgesic, spasmolytic, and antidiabetic effects, as well as significant hypoglycemic action.
side_effects: Belvala virgata can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and stomach cramps due to its toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to its extracts can lead to kidney damage and increased heart rate. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant has been linked to seizures and respiratory failure. If not handled and prepared correctly, belvala virgata can cause a range of health issues, underscoring the importance of proper usage and caution.
